mapper.select: select id, member_email, member_password, member_nickname, member_handle, member_phone, member_bio, member_region, member_status, member_role, push_enabled, member_language, birth_date, created_datetime, updated_datetime, last_login_at, member_name from tbl_member where (member_email = #{loginId} or member_phone = #{loginId}) and member_password = #{memberPassword} and member_status = 'active'

select id, member_email, member_password, member_nickname, member_handle, member_phone, member_bio, member_region, member_status, member_role, push_enabled, member_language, birth_date, created_datetime, updated_datetime, last_login_at, member_name from tbl_member where member_phone = #{memberPhone}

select id, member_email, member_password, member_nickname, member_handle, member_phone, member_bio, member_region, member_status, member_role, push_enabled, member_language, birth_date, created_datetime, updated_datetime, last_login_at, member_name from tbl_member where member_email = #{memberEmail}

select id, member_email, member_password, member_nickname, member_handle, member_phone, member_bio, member_region, member_status, member_role, push_enabled, member_language, birth_date, created_datetime, updated_datetime, last_login_at, member_name, (select f.file_name from tbl_member_profile_file mpf join tbl_file f on mpf.id = f.id where mpf.member_id = tbl_member.id and mpf.profile_image_type = 'profile' limit 1) as file_name from tbl_member where (member_email = #{loginId} or member_phone = #{loginId}) and member_status = 'active'
select count(*) from tbl_member where member_status = 'active' and (member_nickname like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or member_handle like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

select id, member_name, member_nickname, member_handle, member_bio, member_region, member_status, member_role, created_datetime, updated_datetime from tbl_member where member_status = 'active' and (member_nickname like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or member_handle like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) order by member_nickname

select m.id, m.member_name, m.member_nickname, m.member_handle, m.member_bio, m.member_region, m.member_status, m.member_role, m.created_datetime, m.updated_datetime, case when exists ( select 1 from tbl_follow f where f.follower_id = #{memberId} and f.following_id = m.id ) then 1 else 0 end as followed from tbl_member m where m.member_status = 'active' and m.id != #{memberId} and ( m.member_nickname like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or m.member_handle like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) order by m.member_nickname limit #{criteria.count} offset #{criteria.offset}

select id, member_email, member_password, member_handle, member_phone, member_region, member_status, member_role, created_datetime, updated_datetime, member_name from tbl_member where member_handle = #{memberHandle} and member_status = 'active'

select id, member_email, member_password, member_handle, member_phone, member_region, member_status, member_role, created_datetime, updated_datetime, member_name from tbl_member where (member_email = #{loginId} or member_phone = #{loginId}) and member_password = #{memberPassword} and member_status = 'active'

select id, member_email, member_password, member_nickname ,member_handle, member_phone, member_bio, member_region ,member_status, member_role, push_enabled ,member_language, birth_date, created_datetime ,updated_datetime, last_login_at, member_name from tbl_member where id = #{id}
mapper.update: update tbl_member set member_status = 'active', updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id}
update tbl_member set member_nickname = #{memberNickname}, member_bio = #{memberBio}, birth_date = #{birthDate}, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id}
update tbl_member set member_password = #{memberPassword}, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id}
update tbl_member set member_handle = #{memberHandle}, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id}
update tbl_member set member_phone = #{memberPhone}, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id}
update tbl_member set member_email = #{memberEmail}, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id}
update tbl_member set member_language = #{memberLanguage}, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id}
update tbl_member set push_enabled = #{pushEnabled}, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, member_name, member_email, member_nickname, member_handle, member_bio, member_region from tbl_member where member_status = 'active' and id != #{memberId} and ( lower(member_name) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) or lower(member_handle) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) or lower(member_nickname) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ) and not exists ( select 1 from tbl_block where (blocker_id = #{memberId} and blocked_id = tbl_member.id) or (blocker_id = tbl_member.id and blocked_id = #{memberId}) ) order by member_name limit 20

select count(*) from vw_inquiry_member v where v.member_status = 'active' and v.id != #{memberId}::bigint
and v.category_name = #{categoryName}
mapper.update: update tbl_member set member_role = #{memberRole}, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id}
